name: Ox Tail Stew
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a large pot.
2. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer until the ox tails are tender (about 2-3 hours).
3. Add diced carrots, chopped celery, and 1 can of tomatoes.
4. Return the mixture to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer until the vegetables are cooked through.
5. Optional: Stir in 1 teaspoon of sugar for added flavor.
